message:
Extend color benchmarks with additional creation methods

Add benchmarks for:
- color_new_f32: Direct f32 constructor
- color_from_hsv: HSV color creation
- color_from_256_color: Palette index conversion
- color_from_16_color: Basic color conversion

Closes bd-1j0.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
